findings.name: DEGRADED fix
findings.details: After clearing localStorage and reloading: (1) Auto-select did NOT select vik-minikube — prod-cluster-eks (Error/unreachable) remained selected. (2) vik-minikube card still shows 'Degraded' badge in red, NOT 'Healthy'. Inconsistency: dropdown shows green emoji (🟢) for vik-minikube but card badge says Degraded. Only one vik-minikube card (no duplicates) ✅.

findings.name: Timestamp visible
findings.details: 'Updated X seconds ago' (e.g. 'Updated 18s ago') is visible near stat cards. Timestamp updates correctly over time.

findings.name: Refresh resets timestamp
findings.details: Clicking the RefreshCw button resets the timestamp to 'Updated just now' as expected.
